overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a wooden boardwalk through a densely foggy forest at dusk, rendered in a game engine. The atmosphere is heavy with mist and low visibility, with rain beginning to fall midway through the clip, creating an eerie, isolated mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk through dense foggy forest

dense cluster of evergreen pine trees silhouetted against the fog
tall pine tree looming in the mist directly ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a wooden boardwalk through a densely foggy forest at dusk. Tall pine trees flank the left side while the path extends into impenetrable mist ahead. A distant trail marker is barely visible through the fog, and the atmosphere is completely still and silent.

events.description: rain begins to fall, visible as white streaks descending through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the boardwalk as rain begins to fall through the fog

entered.detail: vertical white streaks of rain visible falling through the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, rain begins to fall through the dense fog, creating visible white streaks in the air. The distant trail marker and central pine tree fade from view as the camera advances deeper into the forest. The wooden boardwalk remains the only clear feature in the increasingly wet and obscured environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a wooden boardwalk that transitions from a silent, foggy forest into a rain-swept wilderness. It begins with a steady walk through dense dusk mist, where tall pine trees flank the path and a distant trail marker is barely visible through the haze. As the camera advances deeper into the forest, the stillness breaks and rain begins to fall, introducing visible white streaks that further obscure the surroundings. The scene then shifts as the distant marker and central trees fade entirely into the gloom, leaving the wet wooden boardwalk as the only clear feature in the increasingly obscured environment.
